---
title: "Corpus Construction and Data Quality"
subtitle: "Companion to 'Inventing Climate Finance' (submitted to *Oeconomia*)"
author: "Minh Ha-Duong"
date: "2026-04-14"
metadata-files: [technical-report-vars.yml]
bibliography: bibliography/main.bib
format:
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: xelatex
---

This document describes how the corpus of {{< meta corpus_total >}} works on climate finance was assembled from {{< meta corpus_sources >}} sources, enriched, filtered, and validated. It is a companion to the code repository: the document a reviewer or replicator reads alongside the scripts, data, and configuration files.

All scripts are in `scripts/`, generated data in `$CLIMATE_FINANCE_DATA/catalogs/`, and outputs in `content/figures/` and `content/tables/`.

\newpage

# Corpus Construction

{{< include _includes/corpus-construction.md >}}

---

{{< include _includes/corpus-enrichment.md >}}

---

{{< include _includes/corpus-filtering.md >}}

\newpage

# Data Quality

{{< include _includes/metadata-quality.md >}}

---

{{< include _includes/embedding-quality.md >}}

---

{{< include _includes/citation-quality.md >}}

\newpage

# Corpus Structure

{{< include _includes/core-vs-full.md >}}

\newpage

# Reproducibility

{{< include _includes/reproducibility.md >}}
